skills.name: animation-and-motion
skills.description: Use when building enter/leave transitions, layout animations, stagger effects, or spring-physics motion in pocopine components

skills.name: auth
skills.description: Use when implementing authentication in pocopine apps — JWT verification, credentials, OAuth providers, session management, or guards

skills.name: background-jobs
skills.description: Use when defining background jobs, enqueueing work, configuring workers, or troubleshooting job execution in pocopine apps

skills.name: client-modules
skills.description: Use when setting up or working with Pocopine's managed .client.ts modules for importing npm SDKs (Firebase, analytics, etc.) with typed Rust facades

skills.name: codec-crypto
skills.description: Use when adding or touching any hashing, checksums, base64, percent-encoding / URL escaping, or request signing (HMAC, Azure Shared-Key / SAS, token hashing) in the pocopine workspace. Routes the work through the shared pocopine-crypto and pocopine-codec crates instead of pulling in sha2 / md-5 / crc32c / hmac / base64 / percent-encoding directly or hand-rolling encoders.

skills.name: deploy
skills.description: Use when deploying a pocopine full-stack or static app to Fly.io, Railway, Render, or other hosts using the RFC 080 deploy contract

skills.name: design-to-app
skills.description: Use when turning a Claude Design (or any mockup/design) into a well-structured pocopine app — choosing app architecture (a store plus layout/leaf components), translating inline styles into Pine Stylekit, wiring icons and resizable regions, and verifying the result.

skills.name: interaction-utilities
skills.description: Use when implementing keyboard navigation, floating positioning, element observation, focus management, scroll locking, or accessibility wiring in pocopine components

skills.name: observability
skills.description: Use when setting up tracing, logging, analytics, or observability events in a pocopine application—both frontend and backend.

skills.name: pine-charts
skills.description: Use when building SVG-first, unstyled, accessible charts in pocopine with line, area, bar, scatter, pie, or custom layered visualizations

skills.name: pine-icons
skills.description: Use when working with the pocopine Pine icons feature — the `icon!` proc macro for compile-time Rust SVG embedding, or the `<pine-icon>` template primitive with `register_icons!` for tree-shaking-friendly template rendering.

skills.name: pine-richtext
skills.description: Use when building Rust/WASM rich-text editors with the Pine document model, schema setup, markdown round-trips, or table extensions

skills.name: pine-stylekit
skills.description: Use when building styles with Pine Stylekit, the Pocopine-native utility-CSS compiler, or working with @theme tokens and CSS generation in Rust/WASM projects

skills.name: plugins
skills.description: Use when installing app or server plugins—wiring observability, auth, live queries, or other optional integrations into a pocopine app.

skills.name: poco-directives
skills.description: Use when authoring pocopine template directives (pp-*), understanding directive syntax, modifiers, args, host constraints, or migrating from removed directives (pp-init/pp-cloak/pp-data)

skills.name: poco-expressions
skills.description: Use when writing or debugging {{expr}} interpolation and pine-expr expressions in .poco templates (paths, operators, ternary, calls, assignment, magic variables like $index/$event/$store/$route).

skills.name: poco-templates
skills.description: Use when writing or debugging pocopine .poco template syntax, single-root rules, component tags, SVG namespace support, or template compilation in the pocopine framework.

skills.name: pocopine-cli
skills.description: Use when working with the pocopine-cli: build, dev watch, run, deploy, doctor, env, js, stylekit, lsp commands

skills.name: pocopine-components
skills.description: Use when defining, structuring, or debugging pocopine Components — the #[component] and #[handlers] macros, #[prop]/#[model] fields, templates, lifecycle hooks, and component composition patterns.

skills.name: reactivity-and-stores
skills.description: Use when building state management and reactivity in pocopine — understand the reactive model, App stores, and provide/inject context

skills.name: routing
skills.description: Use when building SPA routes, implementing route guards/loaders, configuring pp-route links, or handling route navigation in pocopine.

skills.name: scoped-styles
skills.description: Use when authoring component stylesheets with automatic CSS scoping to a single component.

skills.name: server-functions
skills.description: Use when defining typed async server functions with `#[server]` macro, implementing access policies via guards, and calling them from the wasm client with `dispatch!` for async state updates.

skills.name: slots-and-composition
skills.description: Use when building or integrating components with default/named slots, scoped slots with pp-let, pp-as polymorphic rendering, or multi-component composition patterns in pocopine

skills.name: storage
skills.description: Use when integrating object storage (S3/GCS/Azure) with resumable uploads, presigned/multipart/sequential transfer strategies, or browser-based file uploads

skills.name: sync-and-live
skills.description: Use when building offline-first data sync features or live invalidation in Pocopine apps — implementing sync streams, mutations, subscriptions, or multi-tenant filtered queries with local persistence.
